description: Explicit invalid-domain and extrapolation inputs that must fail closed under BL-003e envelope gating.
source: Calculation pipeline validity envelopes declared in docs/interfaces/calculation_pipeline_contract.md

cases.expected_error_regex: BL-003 model-domain gate failed: .*internal_pressure_pa=.*outside validity envelope

BL-003 model-domain gate failed: joint_efficiency must be in \(0, 1\].

BL-003 model-domain gate failed: .*corrosion_allowance_m=.*outside validity envelope
